title: New law is based on research from Dr. Margot Kushel and will encourage landlords and tenants to open their homes and help those most in need remain sheltered
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1188 is based on research and recommendations from Dr. Margot Kushel, who has identified temporary housing with family or friends as a critical tool in homelessness prevention, especially for vulnerable seniors.",
    "Dr. Margot Kushel recently received a $30 million grant from Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff to conduct further research on evidence-based solutions to prevent and end homelessness.",
    "Experts have indicated that preventing individuals from slipping into homelessness is a crucial step in addressing the homelessness crisis.",
    "AB 1188 will remove legal barriers and provide tenants with greater flexibility to assist friends or loved ones in need of temporary shelter.",
    "The best way to address homelessness is to prevent it from occurring in the first place by keeping individuals connected to viable support systems.",
    "Using housing with family as a solution can expand options to stabilize homeless individuals while they seek permanent housing.",
    "Providing a means to formalize arrangements for temporary housing can reduce the risk of eviction for families who host homeless loved ones."
  ]
}
```
